title: e-commerce | Brain e-Log
metaDesc: Tailored solutions for importation, stock management, order processing, and shipping. Maximize your online business efficiency with our end-to-end logistics support.
paragraphs: Simplify your e-commerce logistics with our comprehensive approach. We handle the operational tasks, allowing you to focus on your core business: finding unique products and selling them.
While you manage your online store's strategy, we ensure a flawless and fast execution of all your logistical operations daily.
Gérez votre boutique en ligne avec aisance, nous nous occupons de la logistique.
3000m² d'espace sécurisé pour entreposer vos produits près de Bruxelles.
Des solutions sur-mesure pour l'étiquetage, comptage, et emballage de vos produits.
Livraison fiable avec suivi : vos colis sont entre de bonnes mains.
​ Import assistance: Comprehensive guidance for importing your goods, no matter their nature.
​ Goods arrival: Safe and secure reception and handling of each product upon arrival.
​ Quantitative & qualitative inventories: Maintain a vigilant watch over every product in stock.
​ Quality testing: Rigorous checks to ensure superior quality.
​ Secure storage: Securely store your products with peace of mind in our warehouse.
​ Order management: Handling and automated processing of preparation orders.
​ Preparation and labeling: Each package is meticulously prepared, labeled, and ready for shipment.
​ Daily shipping: Commitment to sending each order on time, every day.
​ Returns handling: Streamlining the return process to ensure customer satisfaction.
​ Complete traceability: Track every step with access to customized reports for full transparency.
Take the next step in your e-commerce journey with Brain E-Log. Get a customized quote tailored to your needs and discover how we can boost your logistics.
The company and its team, active since 2002, are delighted to offer you their expertise!

title: Brain e-Log - Solution logistique e-commerce
metaDesc: Votre spécialiste en logistique e-commerce, offrant des solutions complètes de stockage, exécution et expédition à travers l'Europe. Optimisez votre activité avec nos services efficaces et centrés sur le client.
paragraphs: Avec Brain E-Log, optimisez votre logistique e-commerce et concentrez-vous sur ce que vous faites de mieux : vendre !
De la réception à l'expédition, nous gérons chaque étape avec rigueur et rapidité, propulsant ainsi votre activité.
Profitez d'une offre adaptée à vos besoins. Passez à la vitesse supérieure avec Brain E-Log.
De la réception à l'expédition, nous gérons chaque étape avec rigueur et rapidité, propulsant ainsi votre activité.

Solution "clé-en-main" pour tout e-commerçant souhaitant développer son activité sur le territoire européen. Focalisez-vous sur votre production / sourcing et sur vos ventes pendant que Brain e-Log s'occupe du reste !
22.500m² d'espace de stockage pour accueillir tous types de marchandises  sur palettes, étagères, casiers.  Le tout idéalement situé au coeur de l'Europe !

Conservez votre personnel attentif à votre core-business, pendant que Brain E-Log prépare et expédie vos commandes !  Notre équipe expérimentée applique à la lettre votre cahier des charges et garantit les envois dans des délais records !

Brain e-Log expédie chaque mois environ 130.000 colis partout en Europe, et environ autant de plis postaux. Grâce à ce volume, nous pouvons vous faire profiter de tarifs intéressants pour expédier vos propres marchandises.
Brain E-Log est une société belge, exploitant un centre de stockage et de fulfillment au sud de Bruxelles (Houdeng-Goegnies).

Fondée en 2002 la société a d’abord délivré des prestations de logistique classique (plutôt orientée B2B) pour ensuite se spécialiser en logistique spécifique au e-commerce. Du coup, double expertise à votre service !
La société et son équipe, actifs depuis 2002, sont ravis de vous proposer leur expertise!
Commencez par le client: trouvez ce qu'il veut et donner-le lui.

Chez Brain e-Log, nous comprenons l'importance d'une réponse rapide et adaptée à vos besoins spécifiques. Remplissez le formulaire ci-dessous avec les détails de votre demande, et notre équipe s'engage à vous fournir une proposition sur-mesure dans les plus brefs délais. Donnez le départ à une logistique optimisée avec nous !
La société et son équipe, actifs depuis 2002, sont ravis de vous proposer leur expertise !
Nous contacterSupport client

title: Storage | Brain e-Log
metaDesc: Secure and efficient storage options for your e-commerce needs, featuring real-time tracking, flexible space, and strategic locations for optimal logistics.

headings.text: Optimized stock management with Brain e-Log.
Optimize your storage with Brain e-Log.

paragraphs: Discover our expertise in storage, tailored to the requirements of today's e-commerce. With our innovative solutions, ensure that your products are stored, managed, and accessed safely and efficiently.
In the center of major cities, optimizing the reception and distribution of goods.
Cost-effective solutions for worldwide shipments from our central point.
Ideally located for road, air, or sea transport.
Pallet storage area, shelves, and a "buffer" zone for specific operations.
Strict access control and continuous camera surveillance to ensure the safety of goods.
Real-time access to your inventory and movements through our WMS, with daily reporting.
Benefit from a strategic location, unparalleled security, and real-time access to your stocks.
The company and its team, active since 2002, are delighted to offer you their expertise!

title: Fulfilment | Brain e-Log
metaDesc: Streamline your shipping process with our comprehensive order preparation and delivery solutions. Tailored handling and printing services to meet your unique needs.
paragraphs: Optimize your shipping process with Brain e-Log! We meticulously handle every step, from preparation to delivery.
Diverse services to meet your specific needs, from reconditioning to direct marketing campaigns.
We prepare your B2B or B2C orders with care and precision.
Our packaging expertise ensures the safety and presentation of your products.
Each package is properly labeled and entrusted to the appropriate carrier for fast and reliable delivery.
Various services such as shrink-wrapping, labeling, pack assembly, and much more.
Efficient execution of administrative and advertising mailings, with ongoing layout support.
We ensure the customization of your packages and documents for a professional and personalized touch.
Discover peace of mind with our customized fulfillment solutions. Let Brain E-Log meticulously optimize and manage every step, from order preparation to shipping.
The company and its team, active since 2002, are delighted to offer you their expertise!

title: Shipping | Brain e-Log
metaDesc: Fast, reliable, and customized shipping solutions. Experience global reach with our international shipping expertise, real-time tracking, and stringent security measures.
paragraphs: Discover standard and express delivery solutions tailored to your needs. Benefit from fast delivery times and unparalleled flexibility for your local and national shipments. Our express service ensures ultra-fast delivery for urgent requests.

Our customized shipping solutions perfectly adapt to your specific requirements. Whether it's unique size, timing, or handling needs, we offer tailor-made options to maximize your and your customers' satisfaction.

Benefit from our expertise in international shipping to reach your customers worldwide. We handle all customs and logistical aspects for hassle-free international delivery, ensuring effective global reach for your business.

With our advanced tracking system and rigorous security measures, rest assured knowing that your parcels are secure and can be tracked in real-time. Peace of mind is guaranteed at every stage of the shipment.

Increase efficiency with shipping solutions that adapt to your pace. Get a quick and accurate quote in just a few clicks to streamline your shipping processes. Let us help you exceed your customers' expectations.
The company and its team, active since 2002, are delighted to offer you their expertise!

title: About us | Brain e-Log
metaDesc: Discover our journey since 2002 and how our passion for innovative logistics fuels your growth. Meet the team driving the future of e-commerce logistics.

headings.text: Charles de Streel, Chartered accountant and business auditor

paragraphs: Discover the journey of Brain E-Log since our foundation in 2002 and how our passion for innovative logistics fuels your growth. Together, let's build the future of e-commerce.
Brain E-Log is a Belgian company, operating a storage and fulfillment center south of Brussels (Houdeng-Goegnies).
Founded in 2002, the company initially provided classic logistics services (more B2B oriented) before specializing in e-commerce specific logistics. As a result, dual expertise at your service!
The company and its team, active since 2002, are delighted to offer you their expertise!
Commencez par le client: trouvez ce qu'il veut et donner-le lui.
Launch of S&K Consulting, initially offering B2B logistics services.
Acquisition of S&K Consulting, along with a 3000 m² warehouse, by the current shareholders, followed by a series of major projects aimed at enhancing the offered services.
S&K Consulting becomes Brain E-Log, specializing in e-commerce logistics.
Industrial park 17 of 2.500 m² in Wauthier-Braine.
Industrial park 21 of 4.500 m² in Wauthier-Braine.
Centralization in a new warehouse of 15.000 m² in Houdeng-Goegnies.
Specializing in operational & financial management, Florent brings a dynamic approach to daily management to ensure service excellence.
An expert in logistics strategies, Mathieu leads the company with an innovative vision focused on efficiency and sustainable growth.
A former financial director with expertise in financial technologies, Philippe provides strategic guidance and in-depth financial insights.
Founder and leader in the accounting field, Charles brings his expertise dedicated to SMEs for strong legal and financial support.
Join us in a logistics partnership that propels your business to success. Contact the Brain E-Log team now for a customized solution.
The company and its team, active since 2002, are delighted to offer you their expertise!
Contact usCustomer support
